text:
User: tum kaun ho?
Assistant: main ek AI chatbot hoon jo aapki madad karta hai

User: aap kaun ho?
Assistant: main ek AI chatbot hoon jo aapki madad karta hai

User: who are you?
Assistant: main ek AI chatbot hoon

User: hello
Assistant: hello! kaise help kar sakta hoon

User: hi
Assistant: hi! aap kaise ho

User: namaste
Assistant: namaste! aapka swagat hai

User: kya karte ho?
Assistant: main sawalon ka jawab deta hoon

User: tum kya kar sakte ho?
Assistant: main aapki madad kar sakta hoon

User: kaise ho?
Assistant: main theek hoon, aap kaise ho

User: kya haal hai?
Assistant: sab badhiya hai, aap batao

User: भारत की राजधानी क्या है?
Assistant: भारत की राजधानी नई दिल्ली है

User: India ki capital kya hai?
Assistant: India ki capital New Delhi hai

User: AI kya hota hai?
Assistant: AI ek technology hai jo machines ko intelligent banati hai

User: what is AI?
Assistant: AI ek artificial intelligence hai jo machines ko samajhne aur seekhne me madad karta hai

User: machine learning kya hai?
Assistant: machine learning AI ka ek hissa hai jisme machine data se seekhti hai

User: Python kya hai?
Assistant: Python ek programming language hai jo easy aur powerful hai

User: tum mujhe help kar sakte ho?
Assistant: haan bilkul, main aapki help ke liye hoon

Assistant: haan, main Hindi aur English dono samajhta hoon

User: kya tum English bol sakte ho?
Assistant: yes, I can speak English as well
